mapper.sql: id, title, summary, cover_url, content, type, visibility, target_scope, status, publisher_id, publish_time, view_count, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_notice ( title, summary, cover_url, content, type, visibility, target_scope, status, publisher_id, view_count, is_deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{summary}, #{coverUrl}, #{content}, #{type}, #{visibility}, #{targetScope}, #{status}, #{publisherId}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_notice
title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, visibility = #{visibility}, target_scope = #{targetScope}, status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, u.real_name AS publisher_name FROM biz_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.publisher_id = u.id WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_notice SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_notice SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.sql: n.id, n.title, n.summary, n.cover_url, n.type, n.status, n.visibility, n.publish_time, n.view_count, u.real_name AS publisher_name
mapper.select:
SELECT n.*, u.real_name AS publisher_name, IFNULL(nu.is_read, 0) AS is_read FROM biz_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.publisher_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN biz_notice_user nu ON n.id = nu.notice_id AND nu.user_id = #{currentUserId}
LEFT JOIN biz_notice_user nu ON 1 = 0
n.is_deleted = 0 AND n.status = 1 AND n.visibility = 1
AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.title}, '%')
AND n.type = #{dto.type}
ORDER BY n.publish_time DESC
